channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ohtani, Betts and World Series champion Dodgers visit Trump at the White House
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump welcomed Shohei Ohtani, Mookie Betts and the reigning champion Los Angeles Dodgers to the White House on Monday to congratulate them for winning the World Series last season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: March Madness wraps in Florida-Houston matchup pitting tourney's best defense vs best clutch player
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — The national title game between Florida and Houston could come down to the NCAA Tournament's best clutch player against the country's best clutch defense. Walter Clayton Jr.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: One combined Final Four? Talks of a joint NCAA Tournament showcase for the men and women resurface
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Millions tuned in to watch women's basketball powerhouses UConn and South Carolina dominate in the Final Four on Friday. Many more watched Houston and Florida stun their opponents in the men's Final Four a day later.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Alex Ovechkin breaking Wayne Gretzky's record brings joy to hockey and beyond sports
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Ovechkin could not contain his happiness moments after scoring his 895th goal to break Wayne Gretzky's NHL record. After firing the puck into the net, Ovechkin turned and did a belly-flop slide down the ice like he had just won a pee-wee hockey game.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A golfer won $1.5 million in a California tournament. Here’s why he couldn’t cash the check
item.description: Life comes at you fast when you’re a prodigiously talented young golfer, so fast in fact that an awful lot of money might just slip through your fingers.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Trump threatens more tariffs on China as global markets plunge
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Undeterred by a stock market collapse that has continued for days, President Donald Trump threatened additional tariffs on China on Monday, raising fresh concerns that his drive to rebalance the global economy could intensify a financially destructive trade war.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jaquan Brisker's bond with Bears' DC Dennis Allen predates his NFL career
item.description: Jaquan Brisker was originally drafted by the Saints, but instead joined the Bears, where he will be reunited with his former defensive coordinator, Dennis Allen, who is now the Bears' defensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: UConn finishes season at No. 1 in AP women's basketball poll for first time since 2021
item.description: UConn has capped its season at No. 1 in The Associated Press Top 25 women’s basketball poll one day after winning its 12th national championship.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Rugby fans hold their breath as firemen rescue dangling parachutist
item.description: A French parachutist got stuck on the roof of a stadium that was hosting a rugby match over the weekend. Firemen were seen rushing to help the man.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: LA Dodgers visit White House to celebrate World Series win
item.description: Team president Stan Kasten said all the players wanted to attend, according to the Los Angeles Times.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, NewsNation

item.title: Vladimir Putin congratulates Alex Ovechkin on ‘outstanding’ NHL goals record
item.description: MOSCOW (AP) — Russian President Vladimir Putin has congratulated Alex Ovechkin for setting an “outstanding record” as the NHL’s all time top goal-scorer.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — During the final sweet moments of UConn’s 12th national title, Geno Auriemma and Paige Bueckers embraced after the star guard departed her final game with the Huskies. It was the moment they wanted all along. “They’ve all been gratifying, don’t get me wrong," Auriemma said.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Putin congratulates Alex Ovechkin after breaking NHL record
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin congratulated Washington Capitals star Alex Ovechkin for breaking Wayne Gretzky's record for most career goals.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Angel Cabrera wins 1st golf event since prison release
item.description: Angel Cabrera was back on top of a golf tournament on Sunday. He won a PGA Tour Champions event -- his first since being released from prison.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Oklahoma softball coach defends players who attended Riley Gaines event
item.description: Oklahoma Sooners softball coach Patty Gasso defended her players attending an event hosted by women's sports activist Riley Gaines last week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Meghan McCain makes stance on trans athletes in women's sports clear after Andy Cohen spat
item.description: Meghan McCain wrote in a column last week that girls' and women's sports should be kept female and that the issue is really about "fairness.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vladimir Guerrero Jr, Blue Jays agree to massive 14-year contract extension: reports
item.description: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. and the Toronto Blue Jays reportedly agreed to a massive 14-year contract extension worth up to $500 million early Monday morning.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dodgers to kick off string of title celebrations with Trump at White House
item.description: President Donald Trump will welcome a string of sports teams to the White House in April, beginning Monday, to celebrate their championship achievements.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hearing begins for $2.8 billion NCAA settlement, could lock in seismic changes for college sports
item.description: A federal judge has opened the final hearing for a landmark $2.8 billion settlement that will impact every corner of college athletics by saying she will not be granting formal approval on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Justin Turner's error allows Fernando Tatis Jr. to score go-ahead run in Padres' 8-7 win over Cubs
item.description: Luis Arraez had four hits, Fernando Tatis Jr. scored the go-ahead run in the ninth inning when first baseman Justin Turner couldn't make the catch to finish a double play, and the San Diego Padres beat the Chicago Cubs 8-7 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: SARAH TROTTO Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Women's NCAA Final Four tournament a 'slam dunk for Tampa's economy
item.description: Even though the women’s championship is over, Tampa businesses are calling this weekend a "slam dunk." This is the fourth time the city has hosted the NCAA women’s basketball Final Four, and it’s not just basketball fans who are winning.
item.dc:creator: Georgia McCarthur, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Torkelson's 2-run double in the ninth inning gives Tigers 4-3 win over White Sox
item.description: Spencer Torkelson smacked a two-run double to cap Detroit's three-run rally in the ninth inning and give the Tigers a 4-3 win over the Chicago White Sox on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: SF Giants’ Yastrzemski details concerns about Oracle Park fence after Robles injury
item.description: Mariners outfielder Victor Robles suffered an arm injury making a diving catch over the right-field wall Sunday at Oracle Park.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: A healthy Azzi Fudd stars as UConn wins women's NCAA Tournament
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — This time, Azzi Fudd was healthy. And she made a big difference for UConn. Fudd was named the Most Outstanding Player of the Final Four after leading the Huskies to the program's 12th national championship.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Liverpool loses and Southampton's relegation is sealed before a deadlocked Manchester derby
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Liverpool had a shock defeat on its march to the Premier League title — losing 3-2 at Fulham on Sunday. At the other end of the standings, Southampton became the first team to be relegated from England’s top flight this season after a 3-1 loss to Tottenham.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pirates to restore Roberto Clemente sign at PNC Park after Hall of Famer's family expresses anger
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — The Pittsburgh Pirates have reversed course after angering the family of the late Roberto Clemente by removing a sign honoring the franchise icon on the right-field wall at PNC Park. The sign featured Clemente’s name and his No. 21.
item.dc:creator: JOHN PERROTTO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Houston, Florida play for title and put a different spin on the underdog role to wrap March Madness
item.description: Coach Kelvin Sampson’s squad of defenders and deniers face Florida for the national title Monday night. They wrap up a front-runner’s Final Four that featured all No. 1 seeds but ends with the two top ones — Auburn and Duke — sitting at home.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Paige Bueckers ends UConn career with national championship as Huskies rout South Carolina
item.description: Paige Bueckers will leave college basketball as a national champion, as her UConn Huskies earned their record 12th national title on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: Dawn Staley and South Carolina hope to finish off a second straight season with an NCAA championship, which would give the Gamecocks a third title in four years. To do so, they'll need to beat Paige Bueckers and UConn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Alex Ovechkin breaks Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record by scoring his 895th
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Ovechkin has broken Wayne Gretzky’s record for the most goals in NHL history by scoring the 895th of his career. The Washington Capitals’ captain made history Sunday against the New York Islanders by beating fellow Russian Ilya Sorokin on a power play in the second period.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Late foul on Duke's Cooper Flagg sends social media into frenzy as Blue Devils fall in Final Four
item.description: Duke Blue Devils star Cooper Flagg was called for a foul late in their loss to the Houston Cougars on Saturday night. But fans contested that it was a ticky-tack call.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Carpenter and Torkelson homer as Tigers beat White Sox 7-2 and drop Chicago to 2-6
item.description: Kerry Carpenter homered for the third time in two games and Spencer Torkelson had a home run and a double Saturday as the Detroit Tigers beat the Chicago White Sox 7-2 for their fourth win in five games following an opening three-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Strong, Fudd help UConn blow out UCLA 85-51 in Final Four as Bueckers moves 1 win from elusive title
item.description: Sarah Strong and Azzi Fudd didn’t even need much help from superstar Paige Bueckers to propel UConn into the national title game, leading the Huskies to a remarkably easy 85-51 victory over UCLA on Friday night in the Final Four of the women’s NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Fox 5

item.title: Capitals beat Blackhawks 5-3, Ovechkin scores two goals to tie Gretzky
item.description: Alex Ovechkin tied Wayne Gretzky’s NHL record by scoring the 893rd and 894th of his career, the second being the game winner, as the Washington Capitals rallied to beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-3 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Chicagoland foursome heads to Augusta for Drive, Chip and Putt Finals
item.description: GOLF, Ill. - Mastering golf can take a lifetime. Luckily, these four started early. "When I was like 2, I was holding a plastic club, watching a golf tournament - I don't remember which one," remembered 12-year-old Winnetka native Jack Kemper.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: Trevor Lewis excited to be back in Utah for NHL game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah native Trevor Lewis has played a few preseason games in Salt Lake City, but never a regular season game. So as he returns to his home state to play against the Utah Hockey Club with the Los Angeles Kings tonight, he couldn't be more excited.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: GJ Tigers Girls Soccer pours it on Central 10-0
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — There was no moment to take a breath at Unity Field Tuesday night. Seemingly every few seconds yielded a breakaway chance for the Grand Junction Tigers' aggressive attack. And many of those chances were cashed in by the Tigers. Ten of them.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5
